Configuration

Settings

Leave policies, company details, integrations.

Leave types
6 types configured. Customize names, colors, and default allowances.

Paid Time Off

PTO

25 days/year · accrues 2.08/month

Sick Leave

SICK
Auto-approve

10 days/year · accrues 0.83/month

Work From Home

WFH

52 days/year · accrues 4.33/month

Bereavement

BRV

5 days/year · accrues 0.00/month

Parental

PAR

90 days/year · accrues 0.00/month

Unpaid Leave

UNP
Unpaid

30 days/year · accrues 0.00/month
